description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times, and inflicts Down for [2.5 sec->1.5 sec]. [God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.

Dashes behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by [25%->24%] for [10 sec->5 sec]. [God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied 600 higher.

Deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [3 sec->1 sec]. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for [20 sec->10 sec], empowering skills. [God's Proxy]: ATK increases by [???->264*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))], Normal Attack DMG increases by [125%->100%]. This effect cannot be dispelled.

ATK increases by [???->135*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))], and Magic Evasion increases by [200->360]. When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [30%->20%], and damage taken from non-hero enemies is reduced by [30%->20%].

dark.unified: Mana cost is reduced by 1000. [(removed) Ignores DEF when there is only 1 enemy]

light.unified: Damage increases by 50%. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1]

dark.unified: On hit, increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 24% for 5 sec. [(removed) Reduces the target's P.DEF by 30% for 10 sec]

light.unified: Physical Evasion increases by 600 for the duration.. [(removed) Reduces DMG taken by 20%]

dark.unified: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 34% for the duration. [(removed) Increases Mana Cost by 1 and DMG 100%]

light.unified: ATK increase amount increases by 50%. [(removed) Increases Dodge Chance by 150 and recovers 5% HP upon dodging]

dark.unified: On evasion, restores 6% of Max HP every 3 sec. [(removed) Reduces DMG received from Heroes by 15%]

description.unified: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max [10->5] times and is irremovable.
[Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional 250 and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.
[Goddess Strike] Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and own DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%.

dark.unified: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to [80%->60%] of ATK. Applied at [160%->120%] against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.

description.unified: On hit, has a 35% chance to deal additional Physical DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. This effect can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
